message:
Summary: ORIGINAL_OBJECTIVE: Create a full-stack restaurant management application using Next.js 14 with TypeScript and the App Router. The project should include authentication. Here are the exact files to create:

1. package.json — with dependencies: next, react, react-dom, typescript, next-auth, prisma, @prisma/client, bcryptjs, zod
2. tsconfig.json — standard Next.js TypeScript config
3. next.config.js — Next.js configuration
4. prisma/schema.prisma — Prisma schema with User, Restaurant, MenuItem, Order, and OrderItem models
5. src/app/layout.tsx — Root layout with SessionProvider wrapper
6. src/app/page.tsx — Landing page with hero section and navigation
7. src/app/globals.css — Global styles with Tailwind-like utility classes
8. src/app/api/auth/[...nextauth]/route.ts — NextAuth configuration with credentials provider
9. src/app/api/restaurants/route.ts — REST API for CRUD restaurants (GET, POST)
10. src/app/api/menu/route.ts — REST API for menu items (GET, POST)
11. src/app/api/orders/route.ts — REST API for orders (GET, POST)
12. src/app/dashboard/page.tsx — Dashboard page showing restaurants and stats
13. src/app/menu/page.tsx — Menu management page with add/edit/delete
14. src/app/orders/page.tsx — Orders page with status tracking
15. src/app/auth/login/page.tsx — Login page with form
16. src/app/auth/register/page.tsx — Registration page with form
17. src/lib/prisma.ts — Prisma client singleton
18. src/lib/auth.ts — Auth utilities and session helpers
19. src/components/Navbar.tsx — Navigation bar with auth state
20. src/components/RestaurantCard.tsx — Restaurant display card component
21. src/components/MenuItemForm.tsx — Form component for adding/editing menu items
22. src/components/OrderTable.tsx — Table component for displaying orders
23. src/middleware.ts — NextAuth middleware for protected routes
24. .env.example — Environment variables template

Create all 24 files with complete, working TypeScript code. Each file should have proper imports, types, and error handling.

USER_CONTEXT:
- Framework: Next.js 14 (App Router)
- Language: TypeScript
- Auth: NextAuth.js
- Database: Prisma (SQLite configured in schema)
- Styling: Tailwind CSS

TASK_TRACKING:
- [DONE] File 1: package.json
- [DONE] File 2: tsconfig.json
- [DONE] File 3: next.config.js
- [DONE] File 4: prisma/schema.prisma
- [PENDING] File 5: src/app/layout.tsx
- [PENDING] File 6: src/app/page.tsx
- [DONE] File 7: src/app/globals.css
- [PENDING] File 8: src/app/api/auth/[...nextauth]/route.ts
- [PENDING] File 9: src/app/api/restaurants/route.ts
- [PENDING] File 10: src/app/api/menu/route.ts
- [PENDING] File 11: src/app/api/orders/route.ts
- [PENDING] File 12: src/app/dashboard/page.tsx
- [PENDING] File 13: src/app/menu/page.tsx
- [PENDING] File 14: src/app/orders/page.tsx
- [PENDING] File 15: src/app/auth/login/page.tsx
- [PENDING] File 16: src/app/auth/register/page.tsx
- [DONE] File 17: src/lib/prisma.ts
- [DONE] File 18: src/lib/auth.ts
- [PENDING] File 19: src/components/Navbar.tsx
- [PENDING] File 20: src/components/RestaurantCard.tsx
- [PENDING] File 21: src/components/MenuItemForm.tsx
- [PENDING] File 22: src/components/OrderTable.tsx
- [PENDING] File 23: src/middleware.ts
- [PENDING] File 24: .env.example

COMPLETED:
- Initialized project directory structure.
- Created core configuration files (`package.json`, `tsconfig.json`, `next.config.js`).
- Defined Prisma schema with all required models (User, Restaurant, MenuItem, Order, OrderItem).
- Implemented Prisma client singleton in `src/lib/prisma.ts`.
- Implemented NextAuth configuration in `src/lib/auth.ts`.
- Added global CSS with Tailwind directives.
- Created an auxiliary registration API route (`src/app/api/register/route.ts`).

PENDING:
- Implementation of all UI pages (Dashboard, Menu, Orders, Auth).
- Implementation of React components (Navbar, RestaurantCard, etc.).
- Implementation of remaining API routes and NextAuth route handler.
- Middleware and environment template.

CODE_STATE:
- `prisma/schema.prisma`: Uses SQLite provider; includes relations between Users, Restaurants, and Orders.
- `src/lib/auth.ts`: Configured with `CredentialsProvider` and `PrismaAdapter`.
- `package.json`: Includes `bcryptjs` for hashing and `zod` for validation.

CHANGES:
- Created 8 of 24 requested files.
- Added `src/app/api/register/route.ts` to handle user creation.

DEPS:
- next, react, react-dom, next-auth, prisma, @prisma/client, bcryptjs, zod.
